Class EntityReferenceUtils

java.lang.Object
com.github.skriptdev.skript.api.hytale.utils.EntityReferenceUtils
public class EntityReferenceUtils extends Object
Utilities for EntityStore References

    • getComponent

      @Nullable public static <ECS_TYPE, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS_TYPE>> T getComponent(Object object, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS_TYPE,T> type)
      Get a component from an Object (Entity/Ref).
      Type Parameters:
      ECS_TYPE - EntityStore Type
      T - Type of returned component
      Parameters:
      object - Object to get component from
      type - Component type to get
      Returns:
      Component from entity if available otherwise null

    • ensureAndGetComponent

      @NotNull public static <ECS, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS>> T ensureAndGetComponent(Object object, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS,T> type)
      Get a component from an Object (Entity/Ref) or create it if not present.
      Type Parameters:
      ECS - EntityStore Type
      T - Type of returned component
      Parameters:
      object - Object to get component from
      type - Component type to get
      Returns:
      Component from entity if available otherwise will create/add a new one

    • addComponent

      public static <ECS, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS>> void addComponent(Object object, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS,T> type, com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS> component)
      Add a component on an Object (Entity/Ref).
      Type Parameters:
      ECS - EntityStore Type
      T - Type of component
      Parameters:
      object - Object (Entity/Ref) to add component to
      type - Type of component to add
      component - Component to add

    • putComponent

      public static <ECS, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS>> void putComponent(Object object, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS,T> type, com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS> component)
      Put a component on an Object (Entity/Ref).
      Type Parameters:
      ECS - EntityStore Type
      T - Type of component
      Parameters:
      object - Object (Entity/Ref) to put component on
      type - Type of component to put
      component - Component to put

    • tryRemoveComponent

      public static <ECS, T extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<ECS>> void tryRemoveComponent(Object object, com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<ECS,T> type)
      Try to remove a component from an Object (Entity/Ref).
      Type Parameters:
      ECS - Store type
      T - Component type
      Parameters:
      object - Object (Entity/Ref) to remove component from
      type - Type of component to remove
